name: ib-t010-e1-mock
description: IB-T010 E1 mock sub-experiment: chat-short-shaped, low offered rate (well below estimated capacity) so queueing delay stays negligible and the direct-vs-gateway TTFT delta approximates non-queue overhead. Mock TTFT configured to 300ms (per IG-T011/D3 lesson recorded in docs/implementation-notes.md: tiny mock latencies produce +-TTFT noise that swamps a millisecond-scale overhead signal).
